name: liujuntao123--article-rewriter
description: Rewrite and restructure articles, newsletters, threads, scripts, landing pages, and rough notes into clearer, more engaging, more persuasive writing. Use when the user asks to 改写文章、重写草稿、重构结构、增强标题或开头、提升说服力、把笔记整理成文章、把长文压缩成短帖、或把现有内容适配到公众号、邮件、视频脚本、销售页等场景。 Default framework: APAG (Attention, Perspective, Advantage, Gamify).
